scene_summary: A corporate employee at LARP delivers a painfully formal quarterly update about March being the final month of Q1, with no actual work or events to report on.

signature_lines: we've officially entered the culminating monthly node of the Q1 construct
observations.interpersonal_note: speaks to no one in particular, addressing 'us' as a faceless collective; their formal tone contrasts with the absurd emptiness of their message.
